name: Employee News
description: Timely notices of events, deadlines and activities of general employee interest. Items not on consecutive days. Chronological with important items at top.

name: Feature Stories
description: Feature stories, videos, podcasts from college or central pages. Use first paragraph with CTA. One photo/screenshot may be included.

name: U of I in the News
description: Curated by UCM. Stories run as appropriate.

name: Today's Events
description: Copy/paste from Events Calendar with permalink links. Indicate time zones for non-Moscow events. Exclude thesis defenses, most student recitals, non-local sports.

name: Kudos
description: Awards, honors, retirements, major scholarships, non-press-release research papers. Run once.

name: News Releases
description: News releases sent to media from the day prior. Run headline, first sentence, and Read more CTA.

name: In Memoriam
description: Current or retired employees who have passed. Content from college, family, or published obituary. Link to obituary if provided.

name: Job Opportunities
description: Jobs posted for two weeks from PeopleAdmin. Can repost after two-week removal. Newest at top. Must be listed with HR.

name: Employee Announcements
description: Recurring notices and reminders: tobacco-free, spirit days, sabbatical/tenure, risk control, recycling, etc.
